archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with Tech Performance
overall_vibe: Stripe meets Revolut meets premium African fintech. Dark, confident, fast, trustworthy.

design_principles.emotion_first: The app must feel lightning-fast, highly secure, and magical (AI parsing) using deep lighting, grain textures, and fluid motion.
design_principles.zoom_in: Focus entirely on the 80px Mic Button on the single screen. Do not clutter the landing experience.
design_principles.contrast: Deep navy background against electric violet/cyan gradients to draw the eye immediately to the core action.

headings.instruction: Do not use Inter. Use tight tracking for headings. Maintain a heavy, premium feel for large text.

surfaces_and_textures.global_background: Must include a subtle grain texture overlay. Use a fixed CSS noise background (opacity 0.03) combined with the #0A0F1E base to eliminate digital flatness.

glassmorphism.instruction: Use for Flight Cards and prominent modal surfaces. Apply a subtle backdrop-saturate to make it pop like crystal.

spacing_and_layout.tap_targets: Minimum 48px height for all interactive elements. Buttons must be fully rounded.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: Bottom navigation bar layout for mobile. Ensure safe area padding at the bottom (e.g., pb-24).
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Center the mic button prominently. Align text and dense content (flight details) to the left for scanability.

mic_button.interaction: Pulsing glow animation when recording. Must command attention.

buttons.style: Gradient fill or solid primary with hover glow effect.

flight_cards.accent: Left border 3px solid #6C63FF to indicate selection or highlight.

badges.border: Gradient border (or subtle 1px border with background tint)
badges.animation: Fade-in slide-up animation. Only visible AFTER a value (date, destination) is assigned.

motion_and_interactions.global_transition: Fade + slight vertical slide (200ms ease) for mounting elements.
motion_and_interactions.success_state: Confetti particle effect when payment is successful.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must have a visible hover state, usually an opacity bump or subtle glow box-shadow.

icons_and_media.icon_library: lucide-react (or @phosphor-icons/react for duotone/premium feel). Use Phosphor if installing, otherwise stick to Lucide.
icons_and_media.instructions: Do not use placeholders. Use SVG logos for MTN MoMo, Apple Pay, Google Pay.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., flight-search-results, payment-submit-button).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text (#F8FAFC) on dark surface (#111827) meets AA accessibility.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All buttons and inputs must have distinct focus rings.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Plus Jakarta Sans' from Google Fonts in the index.html or global CSS.
Create a global CSS class for the 'grain' overlay and apply it via a fixed pseudo-element over the body.
Implement the exact hex codes requested for background and surface elements. Do not deviate to default Tailwind grays.
Ensure the layout is entirely mobile-first: use max-w-md mx-auto for desktop viewing to simulate the mobile web app experience.
The 80px mic button is the hero of the app. Ensure its animation is smooth and performant.
Use standard HTML5 Web Speech API for the mic functionality.
All interactive elements must be fully rounded (rounded-full).
Never use purely transparent headers/navs; apply backdrop-blur if content scrolls underneath.
Make sure the bilingual setup (French/English) maps UI text cleanly without breaking the layout.
